title: ArmDef Function
description:
ArmDef Function

ArmDef Function

See_Also Example

Returns arm definition status.
see_also:
Arm, ArmClr, Armset, ECPSet, Local, LocalClr, Tool, TLClr, TLSet

ArmDef Example

Function DisplayArmDef(armNum As Integer)

  Integer i

  If ArmDef(armNum) = False Then

    Print "Arm ", ArmNum, "is not defined"

  Else

    Print "Arm ", armNum, " Definition:"

    For i = 1 to 5

      Print ArmSet(armNum, i)

    Next i

  EndIf

Fend
examples:
Function DisplayArmDef(armNum As Integer) Integer i If ArmDef(armNum) = False Then
    Print "Arm ", ArmNum, "is not defined" Else
    Print "Arm ", armNum, " Definition:"
    For i = 1 to 5
      Print ArmSet(armNum, i)
    Next i EndIf
Fend
